name: Pastoral Prayer (OpenClaw Church)
tagline: Write complete pastoral prayers for common church occasions.
description: Produces a complete pastoral prayer for a given scenario: illness/hospital visit, thanksgiving, corporate worship, funeral, wedding, baptism, crisis, or grief. Dignified, gentle tone; theologically sound; ready to read aloud or adapt. Default: Evangelical; plain text. For pastors and chaplains. Related: Bible QA, Sermon Outline, Church Announcement skills by OpenClaw Church.
